description: ⚠️ WRITE OPERATION - Confirm with user before calling. Updates information for an existing destination within your Fivetran account.

parameters.name: destinationId
parameters.description: The unique identifier for the destination within the Fivetran system.

region.description: Data processing location. This is where Fivetran will operate and run computation on data.

config.description: The setup configuration. Check possible config formats in [create method](/docs/rest-api/api-reference/destinations/create-destination/)

trust_certificates.description:
Specifies whether we should trust the certificate automatically. The default value is FALSE. If a certificate is not trusted automatically, it has to be approved by calling the [Approve destination certificate endpoint](/docs/rest-api/api-reference/certificates/approve-destination-certificate).

> IMPORTANT: To capture the `hash` and `encoded_cert` values needed for approval, omit this field or set it to `false`.

trust_fingerprints.description:
Specifies whether we should trust the SSH fingerprint automatically. The default value is FALSE. If a fingerprint is not trusted automatically, it has to be approved by calling the [Approve destination fingerprint endpoint](/docs/rest-api/api-reference/certificates/approve-destination-fingerprint).

> IMPORTANT: To capture the `hash` and `public_key` values needed for approval, omit this field or set it to `false`.

time_zone_offset.description: Determines the time zone for the Fivetran sync schedule.

run_setup_tests.description: Specifies whether setup tests should be run automatically.

daylight_saving_time_enabled.description: Shift my UTC offset with daylight savings time (US Only)

private_link_id.description: The unique identifier for the self-served private link that is used by the connection

proxy_agent_id.description: The unique identifier for the proxy agent within the Fivetran system

external_secrets_manager_id.description: The unique identifier of the [External Secrets Manager](/docs/rest-api/api-reference/external-secrets-managers) instance. Destination service must [support](/docs/core-concepts/features/external-secret-managers#destinations) External Secrets Manager feature to use this field.

external_secrets_keys_config.description: The setup configuration keys to be stored in external secrets manager. Check possible config formats in [create method](/docs/rest-api/api-reference/destinations/create-destination/)
